CustomField.description: If you specify a FieldAPIName, then the framework will check the value of each record in this trigger context against the specified FieldValue. If the values match, the record will be skipped. Matching is done via string conversion e.g. String.valueOf(sObject.get(FieldName)).
CustomField.inlineHelpText: If you specify a FieldAPIName, then the framework will check the value of each record in this trigger context against the specified FieldValue. If the values match, the record will be skipped. Matching is done via string conversion e.g. String.valueOf(sObject.get(FieldName)).
CustomField.label: FieldValue
